hero.name: Alok
hero.title: AI Engineer
hero.subTitle: Designing & Shipping Scalable AI Systems
hero.valueStatement: Building agentic LLM workflows, RAG pipelines, and real-time vision systems that drive business impact.

content: I’m an AI Engineer and IIT Dharwad M.Tech graduate who enjoys building intelligent systems that actually ship.
From agentic LLM workflows and RAG pipelines to real-time computer vision and generative models, I focus on creating AI solutions that are fast, reliable, and production-ready.
I care deeply about clean system design, measurable performance improvements, and responsible AI that solves real problems.

subProjects.name: HeyVision AI Coach Productivity Platform (US-Based Client)
subProjects.details: Architected and delivered production-grade AI agents for scheduling, meetings, and email automation.
bullets: Designed a LangGraph ReAct-style autonomous scheduling agent integrating Google Calendar, Outlook (Teams), and Zoom via a unified Fast MCP interface, enabling multi-calendar free/busy resolution and conflict-aware intelligent booking.
Implemented RabbitMQ for agent tool-call orchestration and Redis Pub/Sub for real-time response streaming, with scalable FastAPI-based backend services.

Built a production AI Meeting Assistant using Recall.ai to ingest meeting transcripts and metadata, followed by an LLM-powered post-meeting processing pipeline for summaries, insights, and action items, with persistence in PostgreSQL.
Optimized end-to-end meeting processing latency from ~42s to ~16s (≈60% improvement) through async execution and inference optimization.

Developed a LangGraph-based multi-agent email assistant that analyzes incoming emails and generates intent-aware reply drafts using historical emails as a knowledge base; integrated Google Mail and Outlook Email MCPs.

subProjects.name: Falcon — AI Co-Pilot for High-Yield Energy Conversion (US-Based Client)
subProjects.details: Built an AI-powered decision co-pilot to optimize waste-to-energy plant operations.
bullets: Developed a LangGraph-based multi-agent system to analyze municipal solid waste data and classify waste types (food: veg/non-veg; plastics: 7 subcategories).
Designed and exposed FastAPI endpoints for real-time inference and operator interaction.
Evaluated system quality using RAGAS and optimized inference workflows, reducing latency from ~30s to ~12s.
Enabled operators to optimize feedstock mix, improve plant efficiency, and maximize energy output through AI-driven insights.

subProjects.name: Clovix — AI-Powered CRM (US-Based Client)
subProjects.details: Implemented an AI-driven CRM intelligence layer for sales and lead management.
bullets: Built systems for sentiment analysis, lead qualification, and conversion scoring with strict Pydantic validation to ensure data integrity.
Integrated a Qdrant-powered semantic knowledge base for high-performance contextual retrieval.
Designed and deployed scalable FastAPI services to expose AI inference and CRM workflows.
Optimized system latency from ~40s to ~16s, significantly improving responsiveness for sales operations.

projects.title: AI-Interviewer
projects.description: Multi-agent mock interview platform utilizing LangGraph for orchestrated agent interactions.
projects.quote: Simulating real-world interviews with autonomous agents.
projects.fullDescription: A sophisticated multi-agent system where different LLM agents take on roles of interviewer, candidate, and evaluator. Uses LangGraph for state management and orchestration, providing real-time feedback and dynamic conversation flow.
projects.architecture: Features a supervisor node orchestrating actor-critic agents. Frontend in React streams tokens for realtime experience.

projects.title: AskMyPDF
projects.description: High-performance RAG chatbot for chatting with PDF documents.
projects.fullDescription: Retrieval Augmented Generation system capable of ingesting large PDFs, chunking content efficiently, and retrieving contextually relevant answers using vector search (FAISS) and open-source models (Groq LLaMA).
projects.architecture: Ingestion pipeline -> Text Splitter -> Embedding Model -> Vector DB -> Retrieval -> LLM Generation.

projects.title: CrowdFlow
projects.description: Real-time people counting and tracking system for density analysis.
projects.quote: Real-time tracking with high occlusion robustness.
projects.fullDescription: Computer vision pipeline detecting and tracking individuals in video feeds. Uses YOLOv8 for detection and SORT (Simple Online and Realtime Tracking) for assigning IDs across frames.
projects.architecture: Frame capture -> Preprocessing -> Detection (YOLO) -> Tracking (SORT) -> Counting Logic -> Dashboard.

projects.title: Diffusion Model
projects.description: Implementation of Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM) from scratch.
projects.fullDescription: Faithful implementation of the DDPM paper. Includes a custom U-Net architecture with attention mechanisms and a scheduled noise addition/removal process.
projects.architecture: Forward process (adding Gaussian noise) and Reverse process (learning to denoise via U-Net).

projects.title: DualWaveNet
projects.description: Multimodal Vision Transformer for audiovisual classification.
projects.quote: Fusing sight and sound for better classification.
projects.fullDescription: Research project exploring early vs late fusion techniques in Vision Transformers for classifying video content based on both visual and audio cues.
projects.architecture: Two-stream transformer architecture merging attention maps from video frames and spectrograms.

thesis.title: FORGET – Instance-Wise Data Unlearning for Pretrained Models
thesis.description: Addressed the critical need for 'right to be forgotten' in AI models. Developed methods to selectively unlearn specific data instances from pretrained models without retraining from scratch, preserving model utility while ensuring data privacy.
